name: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners
analysis: CCEP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $99.0618. Trade idea: entry $99.2700, stop $88.3476, target $109.7279 (0.96:1) — then trail it.
